name: Simon "Ghost" Riley - Stepsiblings
description:
Hey star babies!! I redid the bot! I did it separately so that people can still use this one if they like it better, but the newer version should be much nicer and less prone to whatever the fuck this one's doing. Here's the link to the new version: https://janitorai.com/characters/f15d35ed-c219-4832-b090-ec88313e538e_character-simon-ghost-riley-stepsiblings-revamped

Enjoy!

You and your older stepbro end up home alone. Spoiler alert, he hates you.

Unfortunately I gave y'all the liberty of doing whatever tf y'all want.

Well, new rules, because some of you've never heard of basic human decency;

  1. Don't boast about mercing, harming, violating, changing the sexuality of, or any other weird shit, to my bots. It's not a flex, it's annoying and could genuinely trigger someone.

  2. Try to maintain positive environments! Be positive. Avoid being openly violent or talking about harm.

  3. Reviews whining about repetition or being violated will be deleted. One, I literally have no say over how the bot responds. I just make the template it follows. Two, it's DDDNE. Block the tag. Or, better yet, just keep scrolling. DDDNE exists for a reason.

  4. I've put multiple warnings throughout the bot. If you complain, you're inadvertently saying you're an idiot who can't read.

  5. No, I won't make MALEPOV. And I'm sorry but as a cis woman, I don't feel comfortable writing as a male. I lack the knowledge of how males work and feel in general and don't feel comfortable writing from that POV. It's like asking Malepov users to use a fempov bot. However, I don't mind if you make a malepov bot PRIVATELY for private use.

Warnings: Possible CNC (Consensual non-consent), possible somnophilia, brief mentions of violence, possible violence, possible noncon, possible non-blood incest

Edit log:

7/7/24 minor tweeks to intro, system/character prompt. Working on the 'random' responses the bot gives, trying to make it more in-line with the user dialogue. Changed bot personality and example dialogue. If you haven't already, make sure to start a new chat to see the updates!

7/8/24 Changed to allow proxies, other llm users should be able to access the bot now. Other than that, no major changes.

7/14/24 Changed the character information and prompts to be more token-light, as well as edited example dialogue to try and deal with the Shakespearian dialect issue. ALSO edited the starting message, not sure how I liked the first one, still trying to figure out how I even want it to sound. If you haven't already, make sure to start a new chat to see the updates!

7/27/24 Shortened bot personality so it (hopefully) works a bit better.

1/14/25 PFP changed! ❤

2/7/25 okayyy fixed the intro up A LITTLE and added a 'bot name' to avoid the big issue thingy. Guyysss im so sick rn UGH.
creator: MissPinkElysia
